puzzleDescription: Create a method that determines if a number is prime. A prime number is only divisible by 1 and itself.
objective: Complete the 'isPrime' method. Loop from 2 to n-1. If n is divisible by any of these numbers, return false.
hints: Use a for loop: 'for (int i = 2; i < n; i++)'.
Inside the loop, check if 'n % i == 0'. If true, it means 'n' is not prime, so 'return false;'.
If the loop finishes without finding a divisor, the method will 'return true;'.
